author: hjkwon260
body:
#### PR description:

This PR is the first in a series of PRs to implement a new workflow for ML metadata preservation and utilization via the CMS Condition Database. The goal is to standardize how ML models are versioned, verified, and retrieved. This implementation follows the feedback received during the O&C meetings. Key features of this workflow include:
- Unique Tagging: Each ML model will have its own dedicated CondDB tag.
- Integrity Verification: Using a hash to ensure the external metadata files (json) match the database record.
Detailed information can be found in the following presentations:
[O&C Core Software Meeting (Feb 2026)](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1597345/#18-handling-ml-models-metadata)
[O&C Fall Meeting (Nov 2025)](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1550918/contributions/6750581/attachments/3158045/5610072/condDB_ML_workflow.pptx%20%282%29.pdf)

Future Work (Next PRs)
Addition of `MetadataWrapperESProducer`.
Downstream adaptations to utilize this new metadata-driven loading.

FYI: @valsdav @y19y19 

#### PR validation:

Passed code-checks, code-format, compiled locally
title: ML Metadata workflow initialisation
